metadata.title: The Agentic Organization: Sukharevsky et al. (2025)
metadata.eyebrow: Research Explainer · Sukharevsky et al., McKinsey (2025)

hero.headline: AI agents are doubling in capability every four months, but most organizations aren't designed for them
hero.headline_html: AI agents are doubling in capability every four months, but most organizations aren't designed for them
hero.subtitle: McKinsey's framework for the agentic organization argues that the shift from AI-assisted work to AI-executed work requires a structural redesign of how companies allocate authority, define roles, and coordinate across human-agent teams, not just better tooling.
